zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna Susan Poynter於1583年8月10日出生在英國時，她的父親Richard Poynter Esq.27歲，母親Susanna Curti45歲。她於1605年9月26日與William Hancock I在英國米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1667年2月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanna Susan Poynter于1583年8月10日出生在英国时，她的父亲Richard Poynter Esq.27岁，母亲Susanna Curti45岁。她于1605年9月26日与William Hancock I在英国米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1667年2月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可。

nameMeanings.name: Poynter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pointer
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name, either from Middle English pointere, pointour ‘tiler’ (from an unrecorded Middle English pointer, an agent derivative of pointe, poynte ‘tie, lace, or cord, of twisted yarn, silk, or leather’, for a maker of points for fastening hose and doublet together), or sometimes perhaps from Middle English pointer ‘painter’. Compare Poynter .
In some cases also an American shortened form (or a very rare German variant) of South German (mainly Bavaria) Pointner, itself a variant of Paintner .

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna Susan Poynter was born on 10 August 1583, in England, her father, Richard Poynter Esq., was 27 and her mother, Susanna Curti, was 45. She married William Hancock I on 26 September 1605, in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 20 February 1667, in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 83, and was buried in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna Susan Poynter est née le 10 août 1583, à Angleterre, son père, Richard Poynter Esq., avait 27 ans et sa mère, Susanna Curti, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé William Hancock I le 26 septembre 1605, à Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 février 1667, à Norfolk, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susanna Susan Poynter am 10. August 1583 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Poynter Esq. 27 und ihre Mutter Susanna Curti 45. Sie hat am 26. September 1605 in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England William Hancock I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Februar 1667 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Susan Poynter è nata il il 10 agosto 1583 nel England, sua padre, Richard Poynter Esq., aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Susanna Curti, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato William Hancock I il 26 settembre 1605, nel Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1667, nel Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Susan Poynterが1583年8月10日にイギリスで生まれた時，父Richard Poynter Esq.は27歳，母Susanna Curtiは45歳であった。1605年9月26日にイギリスミッドレセックスステプニーサイント ダンスタン アンド アル サインツ チャーチでWilliam Hancock Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1667年2月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ノーフォルクで83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Susan Poynter(이)가 1583년 8월 10일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Poynter Esq.(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susanna Curti(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1605년 9월 26일 영국 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치에서 William Hancock I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1667년 2월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르폴크에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Susan Poynter nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1583, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Poynter Esq., tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Curti, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com William Hancock I em 26 de setembro de 1605, em Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1667, em Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Dunstan, Stepney, Middlesex, England: сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna Susan Poynter родилась 10 августа 1583 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Poynter Esq. было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Curti, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hancock I 26 сентября 1605 г. в местности сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 20 февраля 1667 г. в местности норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susanna Susan Poynter nació el 10 de agosto de 1583, en Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Poynter Esq., tenía 27 años y su mamá, Susanna Curti, tenía 45 años. Se casó con William Hancock I el 26 de septiembre de 1605, en Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1667, en Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
